title: hypericum × desetangsii
intro: Hypericum × desetangsii, also known as Desetang's St. John's Wort, is a hybrid plant species in the St. John's Wort genus. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been found to have a potential impact on mental health and mood regulation. The health benefits of Hypericum × desetangsii include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of depression. Herbal preparations of this plant often include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a sense of calm and relaxation.
